response: Imagine you’re holding a standard US electrical plug that’s green in color. You need to plug it into one of three different wall outlets: one with round prongs, another with flat prongs, or a third with three prongs. Which outlet should you use?

meta.system: Reword this puzzle in a different natural style, SAME facts, SAME question. Reply ONLY the reworded text.
meta.user: You have a green US plug. Put it into one of these wall sockets: the round-pin socket, the flat-pin socket, or the three-pin socket. Which one?
